title: Test suite for bead history, show --field, and list filters
description: Add 21 new test cases to `tests/test_cli_bead.py` covering all surfaces defined in the spec Test Plan. Tests 1-5 cover `bead history` (default output, --limit, --event single, --event repeated OR, --json). Tests 6-10 cover `bead show --field` (scalar, nested object, array index, missing path, object value). Tests 11-15 cover `bead list --status` and `--agent` (single status, OR status, invalid status, combined --agent+--status+--label, invalid agent). Tests 16-21 cover `bead list --feature-root`, null/bool/int rendering, and backwards compatibility. Use `FakeRunner` / `OrchestratorTests` helpers consistent with the existing test style. Confirm no regressions in existing `takt bead list` and `takt bead show` tests.
acceptance_criteria: All 21 test cases from the spec Test Plan are implemented and pass
Test 1: 3-entry history -> one line per entry, correct format
Test 2: 5-entry history --limit 2 -> last 2 entries only
Test 3: --event single filter works
Test 4: --event A --event B OR semantics confirmed
Test 5: --json emits JSON array equal to execution_history
Test 6: --field status returns bare string
Test 7: --field handoff_summary.completed returns nested value
Test 8: --field execution_history[-1].event returns last event
Test 9: --field missing path exits non-zero, stderr has 'field not found', no stdout
Test 10: --field object value emits pretty JSON
Test 11: --status in_progress filter
Test 12: --status ready --status blocked OR semantics
Test 13: --status invalid exits non-zero with valid-set listing
Test 14: --agent tester --status ready AND semantics with --label
Test 15: --agent invalid exits non-zero
Test 16: --feature-root filter returns only matching beads, AND with --status/--agent/--label
Test 17: --field null value exits zero, emits empty line
Test 18: --field bool value returns lowercase true/false
Test 19: --field int value returns integer string
Test 20: --field array out of range exits non-zero with length in stderr
Test 21: backwards-compat -- no new flags leaves existing output unchanged
uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q passes with no regressions
